Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Destiny is accused of being a pathological liar and faking her own pregnancy and miscarriage with her once boyfriend.
Video.title: DNA Shocker

Image.alt: DNA Shocker
DNA Shocker
DNA Shocker

Video.summary: Kenny, a former correctional officer, was sent to the same prison he worked at after stealing from his mom, writing bad checks in his dead grandfather’s name, and putting a knife to his mom’s throat. Will Kenny be able to turn his life around?
Video.title: My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Image.alt: My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Video.summary: After finding porn and several email and text exchanges with transsexuals, Quintiqua is demanding that her boyfriend prove if he is bi-sexual or not! Then, Herb dug up proof in the form of pictures of Carl and a woman named Deanna online.
Video.title: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Image.alt: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Video.summary: A sisters nightmare ... 11-year-old Ana is terrified of older brother Ray who's regularly beat her since she was just five years old. Ana's fears have grown so much, she fears for her life every night when she goes to bed. While Ray is only 13, his on-stage behavior reveals his true colors, and shocks even Steve. With Ana's mother out of solutions, it's up to Steve and past guest Gary, to show Ray a better path in life and help Ana.
Video.title: My Big Brother Beats Me

Image.alt: My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me

Video.summary: Kathern says that her perfect marriage fell apart when her husband Lance confessed to kissing another woman, but she thinks there is more! Then, Justine believes Dorian has been sleeping with his best friend, Anayah, but Dorian denies it!
Video.title: Emotional Women Explode

Image.alt: Emotional Women Explode
Emotional Women Explode
Emotional Women Explode

Video.summary: Lynette says she has found overwhelming proof that her fiance has been cheating; an update on a couple adding a third member to their relationship.
Video.title: A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail

Image.alt: A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail
A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail
A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail

Video.summary: Alfred thinks his partner is living a secret life; Demetrius says his wife is having an affair and gave him an STD; Latavia's ex-boyfriend takes a lie-detector test to try to win her back.
Video.title: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?
If You Didn't Cheat, How Did You Get an STD?

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Video.summary: Kelly's boyfriend says he has no idea how posts from him seeking sexual favors from other women got on various websites; Genesis thinks his wife cheats while he is at work.
Video.title: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Image.alt: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Video.summary: Friends who strip together stay together, according to Chrissy and Jenny. But will their mothers feel the same? Then D'earl reveals far more than just secrets, and his wife is about to give him a run for his money maker.
Video.title: A Stripper's Tale

Image.alt: A Stripper's Tale
A Stripper's Tale
A Stripper's Tale

Video.summary: A woman finds romance with her fiancee's twin sister; a man turns to another woman for attention; a man tells the mother of his child that he wants to be with someone else.
Video.title: Lesbian Twin Love Triangle

Image.alt: Lesbian Twin Love Triangle
Lesbian Twin Love Triangle
Lesbian Twin Love Triangle

Video.summary: Jessica wants to break up with her rapper boyfriend, but he proposes marriage; Carly reveals her true feelings for her close friend; Nicole, who has been with her boyfriend for five years, wants to know why he hasn't divorced his wife yet.
Video.title: Hunting for a Man

Image.alt: Hunting for a Man
Hunting for a Man
Hunting for a Man

Video.summary: Juice is here to reveal to Jessica that he’s a woman. Jolene has been sleeping with her sister’s girlfriend, Stephanie! Chante doesn’t approve of her sister’s fiancée and won’t hold her peace at their wedding!
Video.title: Lesbian Love Fest

Image.alt: Lesbian Love Fest
Lesbian Love Fest
Lesbian Love Fest

Video.summary: David has been married to Linda for 3 years and has been living in his car for 2˝ of them! He claims that her children won't allow him in the house and in order to save his marriage, he camps out in his car parked next to their home.
Video.title: I Live In A Car!

Image.alt: I Live In A Car!
I Live In A Car!
I Live In A Car!

Video.summary: Three best friends agree to have a threesome; Leo's fiancee confronts her cousin about some explicit photos she sent to him; Brian wants to leave his possessive girlfriend, but she refuses to give up without a fight.
Video.title: Threesomes and Throwdowns

Image.alt: Threesomes and Throwdowns
Threesomes and Throwdowns
Threesomes and Throwdowns

Video.summary: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.
Video.title: Men Show No Mercy

Image.alt: Men Show No Mercy
Men Show No Mercy
Men Show No Mercy

Video.summary: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.
Video.title: Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Image.alt: Kung Fu Hillbilly!
Kung Fu Hillbilly!
Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Video.summary: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.
Video.title: Lying Loves Confess

Image.alt: Lying Loves Confess
Lying Loves Confess
Lying Loves Confess

Video.summary: Donita says she's had a burning desire to be in porn. Today she'll tell her husband. Next David has a feeling that his girlfriend, Chastity, has been up to no good. Next Lee doesn't like his sister's chosen profession and is here to put an end to it.
Video.title: Erotic Jobs

Image.alt: Erotic Jobs
Erotic Jobs
Erotic Jobs

Video.summary: Shawntell says she has every reason to believe her boyfriend Lionel has been sleeping with other women. Then, Chasity thought her and Derrick were in newlywed bliss until she found another woman’s clothes in their laundry.
Video.title: Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?

Image.alt: Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?
Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?
Is My Newlywed Husband Having An Affair?

Video.summary: Glenn says his fiancée Claudia is so obsessed with collecting junk that is negatively affecting their lives. With the help of Trisha and some cleaning experts, they help Claudia clean up her mess and her life! Watch today on Trisha!
Video.title: Hoarders

Video.summary: One week after Ralph was murdered, his parents received a call from a woman named Candy claiming that Ralph was the father of her 20-month old daughter. Then, Kiel is accusing Terri of cheating with several men including his own family members.
Video.title: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Image.alt: Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?
Did My Fiancee Cheat and Have Another Man's Baby?

Video.summary: Shara is devastated that her teen daughter Jenna is wild and out of control. Then, Tee says her 15-year old daughter Aalana is heading down a path of self-destruction. Aalana even abuses her sister CiCi because she thinks her mother favors CiCi more.
Video.title: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Image.alt: Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!
Help! My 14 Year Old Daughter Is Dealing Drugs And Having Sex!

Video.summary: In a special series, “Trisha Uncut”…Meet Greg an aspiring rap artist who wants 27 children of all different races and ethnicities with 9 different women, but his girlfriend Nicole is 3 months pregnant and wants to know if he’s cheating with groupies!
Video.title: Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!

Image.alt: Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!
Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!
Trisha Uncut...I'm Cheating And Trying To Have 27 Kids!

Video.summary: Danielle discovered her husband Joshua was a member of dating websites. Joshua claims he didn’t set up the online profiles and is not cheating. Then, Lorita found her boyfriend Chris lying in bed wearing only boxers and her sister on the couch.
Video.title: Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?

Image.alt: Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?
Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?
Is My Sister Having An Affair With The Man I Love?

Video.summary: Afler the death of her husband, Louise met the man that she thought was her second chance at love. But now she questions if their entire has been a sham! And, Jennifer caught her husband Robert making plans to meet women who live out of state.
Video.title: Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!

Image.alt: Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!
Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!
Prove My Husband Is Not The Father of My Kids!

Video.summary: Ron is investigating who has been stealing money from his bedroom. His prime suspects are his daughters, his wife Emily and her son Jeremy. And later Lori is also missing items in her home, including a handgun and she suspects her daughter Courtney.
Video.title: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Image.alt: Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?
Will The Lie Detector Test Tear Our Family Apart?

Video.summary: Briana fell in love with Joe three years ago. Although she loved him, Briana admits that she cheated on Joe and had a baby. And later, Sadaris is accusing Miriam of cheating with Derrick, and he believes that Derrick may be the father of her son.
Video.title: 3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!

Image.alt: 3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!
3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!
3 Men...3 DNA Tests…The Truth Comes Out Today!

Video.summary: Linda aka Ms. Jackson is 55 years old and still dresses sexy. Her daughter-in-law and grand-daughter Marsell and Antyenelte believe she is in dire need of a make-over and needs to tone down the clothing. But Linda isn't trying to hear that.
Video.title: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Image.alt: Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy
Put Some Clothes On! You're Too Old To Dress Sexy

Video.summary: Brenda suspects that her boyfriend Maurice is a cheater and even her son Chris can back her up with proof! Then, has Chrystal’s fiancé Wayne been cheating with his ex? Later, is fiancée Miranda unfaithful to Robert and did he father their baby?
Video.title: My Son Says He Has Proof! Is The Man I Love Cheating?

Image.alt: My Son Says He Has Proof! Is The Man I Love Cheating?
My Son Says He Has Proof! Is The Man I Love Cheating?
My Son Says He Has Proof! Is The Man I Love Cheating?

Video.summary: Daric denies he is the father of Sarah's baby because he was only intimate with her one time. Later, Candice is desperate to prove to her husband Sam that she has not cheated on him and that her kids are in-fact his.
Video.title: These Children Need Their Fathers.

Image.alt: These Children Need Their Fathers.
These Children Need Their Fathers.
These Children Need Their Fathers.

Video.summary: 38 year old Salina is married to 25 year old Robert. Robert always accuses Salina of lying and cheating, but she thinks he’s covering his own tracks! Later, is Ericka right to use social media sites to prove Robert’s infidelity?
Video.title: I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?

Image.alt: I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?
I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?
I'm 38…Is My 25-Year-Old Husband Sleeping With My Daughter?
